summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bulk CSV upload functionality for real data backtesting. Core features working correctly with some trade generation issues identified.

minor_issues.issue: Backend API not accessible via external URL (404 errors)
minor_issues.impact: Frontend cannot connect to backend via external URL

minor_issues.issue: Full pipeline generates 0 trades despite having real CSV data
minor_issues.impact: Full validation pipeline not demonstrating strategy effectiveness

trade_generation_issues.issue: EURUSD generates significantly fewer trades than XAUUSD
trade_generation_issues.details: EURUSD: 2 trades vs XAUUSD: 91 trades with same strategy parameters

integration_issues.issue: Uploaded market data not visible in Available Market Data section
integration_issues.workaround: Data is successfully uploaded to backend but not displayed in frontend

integration_issues.issue: Frontend shows 'Preview Unavailable' message on external URL

passed_tests: Bulk CSV Uploader component renders correctly in Dashboard
CSV Import - Dukascopy Format (EURUSD & XAUUSD with 8,760 candles each)
CSV import endpoint /api/marketdata/import/csv processes Dukascopy format
Data Validation - Quality scoring and gap detection (100% quality)
Available Market Data API - Symbol listing works
Market Data Statistics - Candle counts and date ranges
Real Data Backtest - Strategy simulation with uploaded data
Backtest results include: total_trades, win_rate, profit_factor, max_drawdown_percent
Strategy simulator generates multiple trades (XAUUSD: 91 trades)
Monte Carlo analysis works when trades are present
Walk-Forward analysis works with sufficient data
CSV Upload UI - All components render correctly
Dashboard Navigation - Market Data tab accessible
Form Controls - Symbol, timeframe, format selectors working
Drop zone functionality - File selection interface working

success_percentage.integration: 80% (Works on localhost, external URL routing issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix external URL routing configuration for both frontend and backend. 2. Investigate why EURUSD generates only 2 trades while XAUUSD generates 91 trades with same strategy parameters. 3. Fix frontend-backend integration for displaying uploaded market data in Available Market Data section. 4. Debug why full validation pipeline generates 0 trades despite having real CSV data.
